span.p:
🎯 Why AgentTool (not sub_agents + transfer_to_agent)
A child with output_schema cannot transfer back —
setting output_schema disables tool calls on that agent.
AgentTool keeps the CEO in control: child returns JSON,
CEO decides the next move. ag_ui_adk forwards each
output_key write as a STATE_DELTA event the UI renders.
